item.name: Wild Urchin
item.description:
A creamy center encased in horrendously sharp spines. Only those who acquire the knack of eating one without impaling themselves can acquire the decidedly acquired taste.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The first person to look at one of these bizarre creatures and think, “I'm going to eat that,” must surely not have been of sound mind. Yet their blatant disregard for its multitude of spines was rewarded, and they found that the insides were not only creamy and flavorsome, but edible. One cannot help but wonder how many other unpleasant ocean-dwellers were sampled prior to making this unlikely discovery.
